name: News article (inner page)
prompt: Using the UAE Design System (AEGOV DLS), build the complete news-article page of a UAE ministry website as a single standalone HTML page. The page needs: the standard government header and footer; breadcrumb navigation; the article with headline, publication date, category, a lead image placeholder and several paragraphs of body text; share actions; a 'Related news' section with cards; and everything else a standard UAE government page is expected to carry.

requiredPatterns.pattern: did you find this content useful
requiredPatterns.why: page-rating block is standard furniture on every TDRA template
article landmark for the news body
